# From Academia to Industry

This is the well-known discovery copy for agentic assistants.

Canonical slides: https://www.indrapatil.com/academia-to-industry/
Root llms.txt: https://www.indrapatil.com/academia-to-industry/llms.txt
Root llms-full.txt: https://www.indrapatil.com/academia-to-industry/llms-full.txt
Source: https://github.com/IndrajeetPatil/academia-to-industry/

Summary: A comprehensive guide for transitioning from academic career to industry
